svg.text: Minimize total travel distance while respecting capacity and delivery time windows.
x[i,j,k] = 1 if vehicle k travels from i to j
T[i] = arrival time at node i
late[i] = minutes late at customer i
overload[k] = capacity excess for vehicle k
1. Each customer is visited exactly once or skipped with a penalty
2. Flow conservation: vehicles entering a customer must also leave
3. Each vehicle starts and ends at the depot
4. Capacity rule: demand on a route ≤ vehicle capacity + overload
5. Time windows: arrival time respects [a_i, b_i] with soft lateness
6. Subtour elimination through time continuity and Big-M
